data.body:
CM Arcie’s Official Blue Archive Twitch Mini-Stream #1

Sensei, join us at CM Arcie’s Clubhouse on Twitch for our very first official mini-stream!
➡️ Blue Archive’s Official Twitch Channel: https://twitch.tv/bluearchiveofficial

#BlueArchive
